nodes.label: School Admin System Documentation
nodes.summary: Complete documentation for the School Admin System built with Next.js and Supabase. Covers DB schema, modules (auth, assessment, attendance, timetable, room booking, i18n), and changelog.

nodes.label: IB MYP Grading System
nodes.summary: Assessment grading using IB MYP rubrics. Criteria A-D scored 0-8 per strand; final grade 1-7. Three MYP year levels (1,3,5). Methods: highest, average, median, mode.

nodes.label: QR Attendance System
nodes.summary: Dynamic QR token (HMAC, ~20s slots) for student scan-in. Geofence optional. Device hash tracking for multi-user detection. Tables: attendance_session, attendance_scan_log, absen.

nodes.label: Weekly Overview
nodes.summary: Printable weekly schedule at /data/weekly-overview. Combines timetable + timetable_exception + topic_weekly_plan. Supports holiday/event overrides and draft saving.

nodes.label: Timetable Module
nodes.summary: Weekly recurring schedule at /data/timetable. Uses tsrange with date 2000-01-01 for time-only storage. Teacher derived from detail_kelas. Has exceptions table for holidays/events.

nodes.label: Room Booking Module
nodes.summary: Room booking at /room/booking. Pending can overlap; approved cannot (DB exclusion constraint). Status: pending/approved/cancelled. Half-open interval [start,end).

nodes.label: Assessment Approval Workflow
nodes.summary: Status flow: 0=waiting admin, 1=approved, 2=rejected, 3=waiting principal. Principal sees only status=3; approving returns to status=0.

nodes.label: Door Greeter Module
nodes.summary: Weekly duty roster at /data/door_greeter. One teacher per weekday Mon-Fri. Dashboard shows if teacher is on duty today (red) or tomorrow (amber).

nodes.label: Internationalization (i18n)
nodes.summary: Three languages: EN, ID, ZH. Custom useI18n hook with JSON dictionaries per locale. Keys namespaced by feature (classManagement.*, doorGreeter.*, roomBooking.*, etc.).

nodes.label: users table
nodes.summary: Core user table with auth fields (bcrypt hash), profile info, role FK. Passwords stored as bcrypt hashes only.

nodes.label: detail_kelas table
nodes.summary: Maps subjects to classes. Used as single source of truth for teacher-class-subject relationships. Referenced by timetable and assessment.

nodes.label: topic_weekly_plan table
nodes.summary: Weekly plan per topic-week with week_date (added 2026-07-16), objectives, activities, resources, reflection.

nodes.label: timetable_exception table
nodes.summary: Per-date schedule overrides. Types: holiday (full-day red LIBUR cell) or event (time-range override). Can affect all or specific kelas_ids.

nodes.label: weekly_overview_draft table
nodes.summary: Persists weekly overview draft as JSONB per kelas+week_date. Unique on (kelas_id, week_date).

nodes.label: PMB Documentation Skill
nodes.summary: PMB (Penerimaan Murid Baru) skill documentation. Contains instructions and references for the school admission process module.
